_comment: UNSOLVED after 18 archived attempts (attempts/10_swap_t9_s0/attempt_1..18_failed.*). Documented in memory project-10task-multiseed-sweep as the only unsolved seed-0 cell of libero_10_swap. Root cause: microwave door is CLOSED at episode start and (a) no Pi0 prompt phrasing grounds door-opening on this fixture across 8+ tries from 5+ pre-positions, (b) physical handle pull fails because the recessed handle (x≈+0.08..+0.10, z≈1.02) sits in/beyond the OSC singular region (rotate_wrist+descend triggers IK singularity at ~+0.159,-0.158,+1.068), (c) without an open door the In() predicate cannot fire — top-of-microwave placements at z=1.107 never satisfy it. OSC walls 20+cm short of the cavity even with move_pose pitch up to 1.4 rad. See 10_swap_t9_s0.json for full strategy_notes.
